title: Fate/strange Fake
sourceNotes: S1 anime is 13 episodes (2024-2026), adapting the Snowfield false Holy Grail War from Ryohgo Narita's light novel through roughly volume 6 (ep. 13 draws from ch. 20 of vol. 6). The Shidzuki Morii manga adaptation is far behind the anime (5 volumes published, only reaching early-series content), so this mapping uses LIGHT-NOVEL VOLUME NUMBERS as the 'chapters' axis instead, following the Ascendance of a Bookworm / Bottom-Tier Character Tomozaki convention. The light novel is ongoing at 9 published volumes (through March 2024) with a 10th and final volume expected in 2026; volume boundaries within S1 are approximate. No qualifying theatrical films — the 'Whispers of Dawn' special (July 2023) was a TV/con-screening prequel, not a Japanese theatrical release.

mappings.arc: Snowfield False Holy Grail War (LN vols 1-6)
War's climax, unadapted by the anime (LN vols 7-9)
